caption: The video captures a large commercial airplane, bearing the logo "Россия" (Russia), as it taxis on a runway. The aircraft is moving forward, its wheels still in contact with the ground, suggesting it has either just landed or is preparing for takeoff. The surrounding environment features a snowy landscape with patches of trees and buildings visible in the background, indicating a cold climate. The sky is clear and blue, providing a stark contrast to the white snow below. The camera angle remains consistent, offering a side view of the plane as it moves along the runway. The scene conveys a sense of calm and order, typical of an airport setting during routine operations.
